Parking Paise

Mumbai · Railway Station Parking · Train in 1 minute

You've parked your car to catch a train to Bandra. Parking fee is ₹140. You only have a ₹500 note — and the cash lady doesn't have change of ₹360. You have to pay digitally.

There's a QR code sticker on the parking meter. You have 1 minute before the train leaves.

PHONE has PaySafe UPI — Scan QR or Send via mobile number
RIGHT PANEL shows the parking meter QR — tap it to inspect
